projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Every research project you're working on, in one place.
projects.emptyDescription: Create your first project to start searching literature, evaluating sources and building your bibliography.

createProjectDialog.title: Create a research project
createProjectDialog.description: Give it a title to get started — you can fill in the rest later.

editProjectForm.notesPlaceholder: Capture ideas, an outline, or anything worth remembering about this project.

deleteProjectButton.confirmDescription: This permanently deletes the project along with its saved articles, bibliography, uploads and chat history. This cannot be undone.
